title: Bank of America resets Nvidia stock forecast after key event
sentences: Bank of America resets Nvidia stock forecast after key event Nvidia (NVDA) stock closed the June 1 trading session up 6.26% at $224.36.
The stock is now up about 20.3% year to date, at the time of writing, Tuesday morning, June 2.
Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 Index (SPY) is up about 11.24% in the same period.
